title: coelogyne muriculata
intro: Coelogyne muriculata is a species of orchid native to India, characterized by its unique, warty appearance and fragrance that attracts pollinators. The medicinal properties of Coelogyne muriculata involve its use in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its reported antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine. In herbal preparations, Coelogyne muriculata is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a paste to be applied topically, highlighting its versatility in traditional medicine.
